title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes frontend development tasks to specialized models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and code generation. The approach leverages each model's strengths to build full-stack applications more efficiently and cost-effectively than using a single model.
